scope.summary: Align custom-tool documentation with runtime behavior and add a regression test that confirms write-capable custom-tool invocations are refused at runtime before any DB call.
out_of_scope: No runtime custom-tool privilege behavior was changed; only docs and regression coverage were updated.

entry_points.name: custom tool dispatch runtime path
entry_points.trace: crates/oraclemcp/src/dispatch/tests.rs::custom_tool_write_uses_runtime_level_refusal_before_db exercises dispatch on a loaded write-capable tool with default read-only effective level.

limitations: Proof is scoped local regression coverage on mocked execution; no full-workspace gate or live Oracle run was re-executed as part of this close.
